title: Introducing MonitoringBench
whyItMatters: Paper here , code , benchmark . Builds on the preview we posted in January . Authors: @monika_j , @ma-martinez , @ollie , @Tyler Tracy We are releasing MonitoringBench , a difficulty-graded benchmark of 2,644 successful attack trajectories for evaluating coding-agent monitors, alongside the semi-automated red-teaming pipeline we used to generate it.
